chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Prohibition of Hunting in the Sanctuary and Its Rulings

text: 2373 - وَ سَأَلَهُ زُرَارَةُ : عَنْ رَجُلٍ أَخْرَجَ طَيْراً مِنْ مَكَّةَ إِلَى اَلْكُوفَةِ فَقَالَ «يَرُدُّهُ إِلَى مَكَّةَ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2373 - Zurara narrated:
He asked (Imam (as)) about a man who took a bird from Mecca to Kufa.
The Imam (as) said: "He must return it to Mecca."
